// note: EXAMPLE — merge the dedicated `gitlab-review` server block into your own VS Code .vscode/mcp.json or user settings. Do not overwrite an existing file. The package is pinned for reproducibility; upgrade it deliberately after compatibility testing. The server exposes read-only MR, repository, pipeline, issue, and work-item evidence plus exactly two confirmed writes: a new review thread and a new MR summary note. Use a short-lived token with the minimum project role required to comment.

inputs.description: Short-lived GitLab token for MR review (api scope)
